description_long: This is a single-story modern house surrounded by several large, leafy trees and enclosed by a partial wooden fence. The house features a flat roof, large windows, and a clean, rectangular layout with open-plan interior spaces visible through the windows. The exterior is finished in a light, neutral color, likely white or off-white, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing a contemporary aesthetic. There is a small outdoor patio area with seating and a hot tub, as well as a fenced section that could serve as a private yard or garden. The windows are arranged in both large panels and smaller sections, providing ample natural light to the interior. The landscaping is simple, with the trees providing shade and privacy around the house.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a light exterior, surrounded by trees and a partial wooden fence. Features include an outdoor patio, hot tub, and open-plan interior spaces.
description_view_0: This view shows the house from an elevated angle, highlighting the flat roof, open patio area, and the surrounding trees and fence.
description_view_1: The front view displays the main entryway, large windows, and the arrangement of trees flanking the house.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the fenced yard, the hot tub area, and the open layout of the house's rear section.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals the patio, hot tub, and the back entrance, with trees forming a semi-circle around the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entry with large glass door, no porch, flanked by windows and minimal decorative elements
